prose: Ethylene frontier orbital HOMO–LUMO gap computed via **DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level** (tier standard, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, using the supplied ethylene geometry (not geometry-optimized). SCF converged in 6 cycles. The headline result is the HOMO–LUMO gap **7.4357 eV** (Koopmans-style vertical orbital gap, not an excitation energy). HOMO energy is −7.6156 eV (orbital index 7), LUMO energy is −0.1799 eV (orbital index 8). No warnings reported. Calculation verified via PySCF backend with integrity status ok/trustworthy.
